notes: SUPABASE_URL is a project constant hardcoded in Update-CPSecrets.ps1:94 (https://kfrffocrfnnuimwrngcs.supabase.co). It changes only on Supabase project migration; rotation is not a routine operation. Invoke-CredentialRotation does not write SUPABASE_URL -- .env files retain their existing value across rotations.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY rotation was [y/N]-gated in Update-CPSecrets.ps1 (optional). In Invoke-CredentialRotation it is included by default. Use -Item 'SUPABASE_*' to skip Anthropic during a Supabase-only rotation, or -Item ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to rotate Anthropic alone.

smoke_tests.name: supabase-connectivity
smoke_tests.command: python -c "import sys; from src.db.supabase_client import get_supabase_client; r = get_supabase_client().table('search_profiles').select('id').limit(1).execute(); print(f'OK rows={len(r.data) if r.data is not None else 0}')"
